creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 156860
Patch Mastersite and unbreak.

It seems the source has moved from Google Sites[1] to GitHub[2]. There is no release until now, so we use the archive file, same version as before the move.

Remove BROKEN, no other functional changes, no changes for pkg-plist.


[1] https://sites.google.com/site/elsamuko/gimp
[2] https://github.com/elsamuko/gimp-elsamuko/archive/master.zip
